# yandex_cdn_raw_log (Data Source)

Get information about a Yandex.Cloud CDN Raw Log configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (String) CDN resource ID for which to retrieve raw logs configuration

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the CDN Raw Log configuration
- `settings` (Block, Read-only) Raw logs settings configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--settings))
- `status` (String) The status of the raw logs configuration (ACTIVE, NOT_ACTIVATED, SUSPENDED)

<a id="nestedblock--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Read-Only:

- `bucket_name` (String) Object Storage bucket name where logs are stored
- `bucket_region` (String) Object Storage bucket region
- `file_prefix` (String) Prefix for log files in the bucket
